final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: surrealist-art
Asset type: fine art print, conceptual illustration
Primary request: dreamscape with giant moon rising from ocean, flying whales, melting clocks, and stairway leading into clouds, full of philosophical depth and visual impact
Scene/backdrop: vast night ocean meeting infinite sky, celestial void, ethereal cloud formations
Subject: colossal luminous moon emerging from dark waters, majestic whales swimming through air, Salvador Dalí-style melting pocket watches draped over floating objects, impossible Escher-like staircase ascending into misty clouds
Style/medium: surrealist painting, dreamlike illustration, mixed with photorealistic elements
Composition/framing: wide panoramic view, multiple focal points creating visual journey from sea to sky
Lighting/mood: dramatic chiaroscuro, moonlight casting long shadows, mysterious and contemplative atmosphere
Color palette: deep indigo and midnight blue ocean, silver and pale gold moonlight, warm amber from melting clocks, soft violet and cream clouds
Materials/textures: smooth reflective water surface, luminous moon with crater details, fluid melting metal of clocks, soft billowing cloud textures
Constraints: maintain surrealist logic where impossible elements feel naturally integrated, keep philosophical mood without being literal
Avoid: cartoonish rendering, cluttered composition, literal interpretation of dream symbols, watermark
